name: detectors: each Node detector honors §2.2 contract (--json, --paths, --dry-run, --rule-state-override, --options, --fix, --fix-dry-run, --format, --cache-key)
command: for d in boundary-schema console-in-src fetch-timeout naked-throw supply-chain; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" --help 2>&1 | grep -E "\-\-json.*\-\-paths.*\-\-dry-run" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $d contract flags missing" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
